/privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
/privacy-policy.description: Stemzel privacy policy. Stem separation happens on your device.
p: Our Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. Your privacy and security are our priorities.

We may collect personal information from you when you visit our website, register for an account, or interact with our services. This information may include your name, email address, contact details, and any other information you voluntarily provide to us.
We may use the information we collect from you for various purposes, including:
1. Providing and improving our products and services
2. Personalizing your experience on our website
3. Communicating with you about your account and any updates or promotions
4. Analyzing website traffic and user behavior to enhance our offerings

We take data security seriously and employ industry-standard measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law or as necessary to provide our services. We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you, provided that they agree to keep your information confidential.

Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and collect information about how you interact with our site. You can adjust your browser settings to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent, but some features of the site may not function properly without cookies.

We reserve the right to update or change this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and the effective date will be updated accordingly. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any updates.
If you have any questions or concerns about our Privacy Policy or the handling of your personal information, please contact us at support@stemzel.com

/terms-of-service.title: Privacy Policy
/terms-of-service.description: Stemzel privacy policy. Stem separation happens on your device.
h3: Changes to this Terms Of Service
p: Welcome to Stemzel. By downloading, installing, or using Stemzel ("the App"), you agree to these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you don't agree, please don't use the App — no hard feelings, it just means we part ways here.
Stemzel is developed and maintained by an independent developer ("the Developer," "we," "us"). Stemzel is not operated by a registered company or corporate entity.
Stemzel is sold as a one-time purchase of $7.99, granting you a perpetual, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the App on devices you own or control.
This is a license to use the software, not a sale of the software itself. We retain ownership of the App's code, design, and branding.
No subscription, no recurring charges, no surprise fees. You pay once, it's yours.
We reserve the right to offer updates, new features, or future paid upgrades separately, but your existing purchase will keep working as-is.

Refunds are handled according to the policy of the platform you purchased through (App Store, Google Play, etc.). We don't independently process payments or refunds outside of what that platform allows.
All audio files you process through Stemzel stay on your device. We do not collect, upload, store, or have any access to your audio files.
You are solely responsible for the audio files you choose to process, including ensuring you have the rights or permissions necessary to use, split, or modify them.
Stemzel is a tool. What you do with it — and whether that's legal — is between you and, well, whoever owns the rights to what you're splitting.
Reverse-engineer, decompile, or redistribute the App or its underlying model in violation of applicable licenses.
Resell, sublicense, or redistribute your copy of the App to others.

Stemzel's htdemucs-based processing relies on open-source components. The Stemzel app itself — including its interface, branding, and code — is the property of the Developer, except where third-party open-source licenses apply.

Stemzel is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We don't guarantee that stem separation will be perfect, that the App will be free of bugs, or that it will meet your specific needs. Audio separation technology is good, not magic.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Developer is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of Stemzel, including but not limited to data loss, lost profits, or that one remix that didn't come out right.
Total liability, in any case, is limited to the amount you paid for the App ($7.99).
We reserve the right to discontinue support for the App at any time. Since Stemzel runs locally, you can keep using your existing copy even if future updates or support end.
These Terms are governed by the laws of Georgia, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.

We reserve the right to update or change this Terms of Service at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and the effective date will be updated accordingly. We encourage you to review this Terms of Service periodically for any updates.
